perturbation.original_text: Recipient shall promptly return all tangible information, including any and all c opies or partial copies thereof and thereupon confirm destruction of all information held electronically.
perturbation.changed_text: Recipient shall return all tangible information within 30 days of Discloser's request. If the Discloser does not request within 30 days, Recipient is not required to return them or confirm destruction of all information held electronically.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the condition of returning confidential information from 'upon request' to 'within 30 days of request, or not at all' creates a conflict with Section 9. Section 9 ensures that obligations in paragraph 6 continue post-termination. The modified version of paragraph 6 potentially releases Recipient from these obligations after 30 days of the termination of the agreement if the Discloser did not make the request within the specific timeframe, creating uncertainty in post-termination obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall become effective as of date hereof and shall terminate upon the express written termination by either one of the parties hereto . Termination of the FLIX ENTERTAINMENT LLC NON -DISCLOSURE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT - Page 4 of 4 Agreement shall not relieve either party of any obligation set forth in Paragraph s 4 or 6 with respect to Confidential I nformation, and all such obligations shall continue until expiration of the period set forth in Paragrap h 4.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a condition where the recipient might not have to return the confidential information after 30 days, directly contradicting the contradicted text, which states that termination of the agreement shall not relieve either party of any obligation set forth in Paragraph 6. This falls under the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type, because different sections of a contract provide conflicting obligations. The modified paragraph 6 conflicts directly with the continued obligations outlined in the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and understanding of the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter of this Agreement. Any amendment or modification of this Agreement shall be in writing and executed by a duly authoriz ed representative of either the Discloser or Recipient .
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and understanding of the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter of this Agreement. Any amendment or modification of this Agreement shall be in writing and executed by a duly authoriz ed representative of either the Discloser or Recipient . However, Discloser may unilaterally modify this agreement by providing written notice to Recipient. Recipient's continued engagement constitutes agreement to the modification.
perturbation.explanation: Adding a clause that allows Discloser to unilaterally modify the agreement contradicts the previous sentence requiring written agreement from both parties for modifications. It creates an in-text contradiction, as it is unclear if both parties must agree to changes or if the Discloser can change the terms alone.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and understanding of the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter of this Agreement. Any amendment or modification of this Agreement shall be in writing and executed by a duly authoriz ed representative of either the Discloser or Recipient . However, Discloser may unilaterally modify this agreement by providing written notice to Recipient. Recipient's continued engagement constitutes agreement to the modification.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that any modification requires written agreement from both Discloser and Recipient. The changed text adds a clause allowing the Discloser to unilaterally modify the agreement with written notice, effectively negating the requirement for mutual agreement. This creates a direct contradiction within the same text because it's unclear whether both parties need to agree, or if the Discloser can modify the agreement alone. The Contradicted text is the same as the Changed Text.

perturbation.original_text: All tangible information, including drawings, specifications and other information furnished hereunder s hall remain the property of Discloser.
perturbation.changed_text: All tangible information, including drawings, specifications and other information furnished hereunder shall remain the property of Discloser unless Recipient incorporates it into their own proprietary products or services, in which case, Recipient will own that information to the extent of its incorporation.
perturbation.explanation: The added condition that allows Recipient to own previously confidential information after incorporating creates an in-text contradiction with Section 4. Section 4 dictates all Confidential Information shall be maintained in confidence. This new condition could allow for the release of formerly confidential information if it is part of Recipient's new product.
perturbation.contradicted_text: For a period of two (2) years from the dat e of receipt, all Confidential I nformation shall be maintained in confidence by Recipient , shall not be disclosed , published, communicate d, divulged or revealed in any manner, to any other person, firm, corporation or other third party entity, including employees of Recipient who do not have a need to know , or who should not know any such details pertaining to Confidential Information in the course of their employment , except as may otherwise provided in this Agreement. Recipient further affirmatively agrees not to use any Confidential I nformation received from Discloser except for the express purposes set forth herein.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a condition where the Recipient can own previously confidential information by incorporating it into their products or services. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which mandates that all Confidential Information be maintained in confidence for two years and not be disclosed. The changed text makes it possible for the Recipient to disclose this formerly confidential information, leading to a clear contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement will be governed by the laws of the State of Texas , without regard to its conflict of laws provisions .
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement will be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws provisions, unless the Recipient is located outside of Delaware, in which case, the laws of the Recipient's principal place of business shall govern.
perturbation.explanation: The modification introduces a contradiction by specifying different governing laws based on the Recipient's location. This contradicts the initial, definitive statement that Texas law governs, creating uncertainty regarding which jurisdiction's laws apply, especially if the Recipient changes locations during the agreement's term. The original agreement in Section 8 mentions dispute resolutions, attorneys' fees and other legal issues. These can vary based on the legal jurisdiction, which introduces further uncertainty and potential disputes over enforcing the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Discloser and Recipient agree that it would be impossible or inadequate to measure and calculate Discloser’s damages from any breach of the covenants set forth herein , especially with regard any breach associat ed with Confidential Information that was to be maintained behind the Information Barrier . Accordingly, the Recipient agrees that in the event of a breach of any of the covenants contained in this Agreement, Discloser will have available, in addition to any other right or remedy available, the right to obtain an injunction from a court of competent jurisdiction restraining such breach or threatened breach and to specific performance of any such provision of this Agreement. Recipient further agrees that no bond or other security shall be required in obtaining such equitable relief and that Recipient hereby consents to the issuance of such injunction and to the ordering of specific performance. If any action or proceeding is brought to enforce this Agreement because of an alleged or actual dispute, breach, default, or misrepresentation in connection with any of the provisions of this Agreement, should it prevail, Discloser shall be entitled to recover reasonable attorneys' fees and other costs incurred in suc h action or proceeding in addition to any other relief to which it may be entitled.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a conditional governing law based on the Recipient's location, which contradicts the original statement that Texas law governs the entire agreement. This directly impacts the contradicted text regarding dispute resolution and attorneys' fees, as the applicable laws and legal precedents will vary significantly depending on whether Texas, Delaware, or the Recipient's principal place of business governs, creating a direct conflict and uncertainty in enforcing the agreement. This fits the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.
